clusters.title: Drug dealer who kicked mother, 56, to death at random after crashing his car while high on cannabis is found guilty of murder

versions.title: Drug dealer who kicked mother, 56, to death at random after crashing his car while high on cannabis is found guilty of murder
versions.deck: Chukwuemeka Ahanonu, 23, launched a vicious assault on 56-year-old mother Nila Patel moments after flipping his BMW on its roof in broad daylight in Leicester city centre last June.
